title: ASR Outdoor 24pc Complete 50" Folding Sluice Box Backpack Gold Panning Kit
description:
The ASR Outdoor Deluxe Gold Panning Kit comes with everything you need to strike it rich in one convenient place! All of the items included fit neatly into a double-stitched canvas backpack that can hold up to 30 liters or 1830 cubic inches in volume. The included gold mining equipment is ready to deploy from your backpack. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in the stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning. Best in quality components are included in the backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. The gold panning supplies included are for all experience levels of gold prospecting enthusiasts

ASR Outdoor 24pc Complete 50" Folding Sluice Box Backpack Gold Panning Kit

The ASR Outdoor Deluxe Gold Panning Kit comes with everything you need to strike it rich in one convenient place! All of the items included fit neatly into a double-stitched canvas backpack that can hold up to 30 liters or 1830 cubic inches in volume.

The included gold mining equipment is ready to deploy from your backpack. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in the stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning.

Key Features

  • GOLD PANNING KIT WITH SLUICE BOX & BACKPACK: Everything you need to strike it rich in one convenient gold panning kit. Double stitched canvas backpack
  • EFFORTLESS USE: Gold mining equipment ready to deploy from your backpack. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning.
  • HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Best in quality components included in the backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. For all experience levels of gold panning enthusiasts.
  • GOLD SLUICE BOX: Highly durable, constructed from rust-free aluminum. Includes miners moss and gold carpet pre installed.
  • GOLD MINING EQUIPMENT: 50" Gold Sluice Box, Backpack, 1/2" sifting classifier screen, 10" and 12" dual riffle gold pans, 10” finishing gold pan, Magnifying tweezers, (2) Large collection glass vials, (2) Small collection glass vials, (2) Carabiner clips, Folding pick axe shovel, Marking ribbon (assorted colors), (4) Pipettes, (2) Snifter bottles, (4) Assorted bedrock crevice tool picks

Product Specifications

  • MPN: Complete Sluice Box Kit
  • UPC: 810131708221
  • Color: Black

Best in quality components are included in the backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. The gold panning supplies included are for all experience levels of gold prospecting enthusiasts.

The sluice box itself is made of highly durable materials, constructed from rust-free aluminum. It includes miners moss and gold carpet pre-installed. Extended Dimensions: 50" Length; 9.25" Channel; Folded Dimensions: 15" x 9.25" x 5" (LxWxH); 13.25" Flange

In addition to the sluice box and the durable canvas backpack, we’ve included a bunch of other gold panning tools and accessories that will aid in the extraction, processing and collection of gold and other precious metals. In all the 24pc backpack sluice box kit includes;

(1) 50" Folding sluice box (1) 30L Canvas backpack (1) 1/2" Sifting classifier screen (1) 12” dual riffle gold pan (1) 10” dual riffle gold pan (1) 10” sidewall ripple gold pan (1) Magnifying tweezer (2) Large collection glass vials (2) Small collection glass vials (2) Carabiner clips (1) Folding pick axe shovel (1) Marking ribbon (assorted colors) (4) Pipettes (2) Gold snifter bottles (4) Assorted bedrock crevice tool picks
